name: red stripe knights
desc: He carries out adaptive transformation of ships according to his own combat needs. The ship's armor value, structure value, power grid strength and maneuverability have been improved. However, such drastic modifications come at the expense of some shield efficiency.

name: oath taker design
desc:
The ship designed by the Oathkeeper is geared towards mobile guerrilla warfare. It has a simple structure and diverse functions. It is not good at performing high-intensity combat missions for a long time. Although the hull is weak, it is easy to maintain.
The ship's repair speed is increased by %s, the supplies consumed by repairs are reduced by %s, and the maximum power grid can be modified is increased by %s, but the ship's combat readiness loss rate is increased by %s.
Moreover, the ship carries electronic warfare equipment, which reduces its %s detection distance and can also reduce the overall sensor signal strength of the fleet.

name: Energy Projection Computing Array
desc: A specially modified positioning array dedicated to energy weapon projection. While it can only increase the range of %s live ammunition weapons, it can also increase the range of energy weapons of fighter %s, frigate %s, destroyer %s, cruiser %s and battleship %s according to the size of the ship. Not compatible with targeting systems, advanced optics, focused targeting cores, and advanced targeting cores
sModDesc: Integrate the computing array into the ship's central command system to increase the damage of the ship's energy weapons by an additional %s

name: mass projection calculation array
desc: A specially modified positioning array dedicated to the delivery of live ammunition weapons. While it can only increase the range of %s energy weapons, it can also increase the range of live ammunition weapons of fighter %s, frigate %s, destroyer %s, cruiser %s and battleship %s according to the size of the ship. Not compatible with targeting systems, advanced optics, focused targeting cores, and advanced targeting cores
sModDesc: Integrate the computing array into the ship's central command system to increase the damage of the ship's live weapons by an additional %s

name: universal rangefinder
desc: Integrated weapon range across the ship.
short: Integrated weapon range across the ship.
sModDesc: The computing system is fully integrated into the ship frame. The sophisticated energy computing system will reduce the radiation consumption of live ammunition and energy weapons %s and increase the rate of fire of %s, but at the cost of %s damage reduction.

name: Fire control upgrade
desc: Improving the ship's fire control system can increase the movement speed of %s turrets, reduce the recoil generated by %s non-missile weapons, increase the range of %s non-missile weapons, and reduce the radiation energy generated by %s non-missile weapons.
sModDesc: Additional increase to %s auto-fire accuracy and projectile velocity of ballistic weapons.

name: Fighter Forge Overrelaxation
desc: When the number of fighter aircraft falls below a certain threshold, the power grid is occupied to accelerate fighter production and maintenance.
sModDesc: Additional increase in %s fighter replacement speed under normal conditions.

name: Tidal engine modification
desc: Modifications to the engine output system. Improves %s ship maneuverability under normal conditions; and uses periodic energy surges to periodically enhance ship performance.
sModDesc: Increases the ship's maximum speed by an additional %s knots under normal conditions.

name: Surge shield enhancement
desc: Modify the ship's power grid system to increase the speed of the ship's shield %s and reduce the maintenance of the shield %s.
sModDesc: Increases shield strength by an additional %s and converts %s of hard radiant damage into soft radiant energy.

name: Laminar flow hull reinforcement
desc: The core spillover energy is used to structurally reinforce the hull strength, increasing the damage reduction of the ship armor %s, but reducing the shield expansion and rotation speed maintained by the shield %s and increasing the shield maintenance cost.
sModDesc: Additional increase in armor value of ship %s.

name: Chaoping shock relief
desc:
The shield system is connected to the grid and the time axis register is used. When the shield is subjected to impact, time tremor measures can be taken to alleviate the intensity and maintain stability. But the greater the impact, the less obvious the relief. At the same time, the time bubbles caused by a large number of changes in the timeline will produce violent thermal arcs, and they will lock the nearest register for release.
Reduces the ship's shield to %s kinetic energy damage, %s energy damage, and converts %s of hard radiation damage to soft radiation.
sModDesc: Increases shield speed by an additional %s.

name: Bi-phase drive
desc: A type of special component specifically designed to enhance the maneuverability of ships with the Crusader energy core. It improves the energy utilization efficiency of the Crusader core in a special way and supplies excess energy to the power cabin to increase the speed and maneuverability of the ship.

name: Partial Phase Dimension Difference Defense
desc: A type of special component specifically designed to enhance the defensive performance of ships with the Crusader energy core. It absorbs projectiles, creates an entropy increase, and uses this to charge the plating.

name: Overload of partial phase weapon system
desc: A type of special component designed to enhance the firepower of ships with the Crusader Energy Core, overloading weapon systems and generating additional radiation.

name: Protocol Override-Stick
desc: Our ship was ordered to hold its position no matter the cost.

name: Agreement Override-Oath
desc: go ahead! go ahead! Only move forward! This is the oath we have made!

name: Protocol Override-Hunting
desc: Silent wolves are hunting, carrying out His judgments.

name: Military standard hull modification
desc:
Thanks to the Crusaders' consistent multi-redundant and strong modular design, these ships can more easily assume different roles with less modifications. Install this plugin to enhance your ship's combat performance.
Note: This plug-in may impose more requirements on fleet logistics, please act accordingly.
short: Exchange maintenance costs for better combat performance.
sModDesc: Performance is enhanced by %s of the base value, and supply consumption is reduced by %s of the base value.

name: Ocean sailing modification
desc:
Thanks to the Crusaders' consistent multi-redundant and strong modular design, these ships can more easily assume different roles with less modifications. Install this plugin to enhance your ship's ocean-going performance.
Reduce the supply, fuel, and personnel requirements required for routine maintenance of %s ships.
Increase the post-war repair speed of %s ships.
Increases the carrying capacity of %s ship, including cargo capacity and fuel load.
Each flight deck provides the ship with an additional %s of carrying capacity.
short: Optimize daily ship maintenance costs to adapt to ocean voyages
sModDesc: Further reduce the daily maintenance cost of %s ship.

name: redundant system framework
desc: The ship's forced dissipation rate is increased by %s, the ship's hull structure is increased by %s, and the redundant structure is connected to the ship's power grid to optimize weapon output performance, but the ship's regular dissipation is reduced by %s.
sModDesc: Increase the ship's forced dispersion rate by %s, the ship's hull structure by %s, and the ship's maximum capacity by %s.

name: Strong thermal conductivity structure additional
desc: The ship's dissipation is increased by %s, and the hull structure is increased by %s, but the hull armor value is decreased by %s. At the same time, as the hull structure decreases during combat, the additional increased radiation dissipation capacity decreases from %s to 0, and the additional hull damage reduction increases from 0 to %s.
sModDesc: The ship's dissipation rate is increased by %s, the hull structure is increased by %s, and %s of hard radiation energy can be dissipated when the shield is opened.

name: Offensive weapon base
desc: Strengthen the base of the weapon, speed up the repair of the weapon, accelerate the rate of fire of the weapon and repair a certain amount of ship structure within 2 seconds after the weapon is repaired.

name: Siamese ship
desc: Synchronize certain data between the mother and daughter hulls.

desc: Synchronize certain data between the mother and daughter hulls.

desc: Synchronize certain data between the mother and daughter hulls.

desc: Synchronize certain data between the mother and daughter hulls.

desc: Synchronize certain data between the mother and daughter hulls.

name: Sky Throne Scheduling System
desc: In order to optimize the coordination and scheduling process among the various firepower units of this behemoth, this specially designed subsystem was given the task of optimizing firepower deployment and coordinating the entire ship's air traffic control; undoubtedly, she completed this task perfectly.

name: Ship-to-Boat Conflict
desc: %s, the ship plug-in you are trying to install conflicts with this ship or another ship plug-in that is already installed.
short: %s, the ship plug-in you are trying to install conflicts with this ship or another ship plug-in that is already installed.

name: fleet airport
desc:
This ship has an open engineering system. With its huge hull, it can simultaneously undertake the functions of aircraft takeoff and landing and combat ship maintenance. It also has a specially designed air traffic control system that can command a large number of carrier-based aircraft groups to carry out denial and strike tactics during combat.
At the same time, the logistics system has increased her cargo and fuel capacity by %s, and the fleet maintenance speed has been increased by %s.

name: Giant open airport
desc: This ship is designed to be completely open. With its huge hull, it can simultaneously undertake the functions of taking off and landing aircraft and maintaining small ships. Coupled with the specially designed air traffic control system, she can always gain an overwhelming advantage in air combat command.

name: open airport
desc: Inspired by the giant open airport of the Michelangelo class and its supporting subsystems, the open airport developed by the Knights' research institute to adapt to its own aviation combat needs can almost replicate the original's combat performance, but its redundant system does not support systematic refurbishment of the ship, but it still supports combat readiness and basic maintenance of small ships.

name: Apocalypse Computing Array
desc:
She may be able to reach the boundaries of human cognition, measure life, and calculate death.
Weapon firing range reduced by %s
When destroying an enemy unit, the ship restores %s structural value and repairs %s armor.
The ship's damage is increased by %s per %s of structure value lost.

name: Crusader phase coating
desc: Armor-like plating formed from the controlled leakage of energy from the advanced Crusader Core, providing %s damage reduction based on hull size and radiation capacity, and is found on most ships with Crusader Cores installed. This is a complete coating composed of pure energy, showing peculiar phase-phase characteristics, which can reduce the damage received by %s weapons and engines, reduce the damage received by %s ship hulls, and reduce the EMP damage received by %s ships; all damage reduction effects are calculated based on the current transient coating integrity.

name: Crusader Power Core
desc:
A type of high-power integrated energy core installed on specially designed ships. The huge amount of energy it generates can slightly distort space and even time. However, the leaked energy interfered with the ship's shield generator, reducing the shield's combat effectiveness.
Ship's time flow speeds up %s
Increase the rate of forced rendering of %s
Shield efficiency reduced by %s

name: airspace control system
desc:
The enlarged flight deck is equipped with an enhanced shipboard nanofactory and a specially designed air traffic control system to facilitate the preparation and command of fighters and interceptors for combat.

When the ship's crew is a conventional bomber, such specialized facilities will not provide gains or cause performance impairment.
short: Improve fighter replacement rate, increase fighter combat range and weapon damage

name: Carrier-based aircraft fire support control
desc:
A carrier doctrine that excels in extended warfare. This encourages faster fighter deployment and recovery on a type of schedule known as 'cyclic operations'. Exceptional safety measures for the pilots and up-armored fighter chassis are applied to increase the efficiency of this doctrine.

Can only install %s type of S.L. Carrier hullmod on a ship.
short: Faster fighter replacement, fighters gets reduced damage taken and lesser fighter crew casualties. Extends fighter engagement range.

name: Carrier-based aircraft area advance control
desc:
An aggressive strike craft doctrine meant to neutralize and destroy enemies quickly. Strike craft ordnance is significantly tuned up to deliver deadly alpha strikes, turning the carrier's fighters into a flock of terror on the battlefield.

Can only install %s type of S.L. Carrier hullmod on a ship.
short: Increases fighter's missile speed, durability, maneuverability and range. Damage to destroyer size hull and above is increased.

name: Specialized automatic system
desc:
Under the strong request of Chief Scholar Tops, all large ships of the Crusade Project have undergone special ship system designs in order to be compatible with the human command system and the AI ​​core command system. This particular design survived in the designs of the Crusader Project and its successors over the centuries.

Its specialized system requires stricter maintenance methods, which increases the monthly maintenance requirements of %s.

name: automatic mode
desc: The ship can be customized to be assigned human crew or {AI} piloting. It is currently in: automatic mode. Click to remove the ship to switch modes.

name: Manned mode
desc: The ship can be customized to be driven by human crew or AI. It is currently in manned mode. Click to remove the ship to switch modes.

name: Specialized fully automatic ship
desc: It can operate fully automatically without the need for human crew operations, but retains a life support system for a certain number of crew members.
short: It does not require a crew and cannot carry a crew.

name: Aviation command switching
desc:
The enlarged flight deck and specially designed air traffic control system have created a complete integrated flight deck facility designed specifically for the fight for space superiority. It is convenient for preparing and commanding fighters and interceptor aircraft to fight.

When the ship's crew is a conventional bomber, these specialized facilities will not provide gains or cause performance impairment.
short: Improve fighter replacement rate, increase fighter combat range and weapon damage

name: Support mode
desc: The aviation command plan with conservative defense as the main idea greatly reduces the attack radius of carrier-based aircraft and increases the attack range of carrier-based aircraft weapons.

name: Assault mode
desc: The aviation command plan with active attack as the main idea strengthens the penetration capability of carrier-based aircraft, but correspondingly increases the loss of personnel that may be caused by the destruction of carrier-based aircraft.

name: solid wall
desc: The adaptive shield strengthening system enhances the shield effectiveness and shield deployment speed as the radiation energy increases.

name: Xunyu
desc: The adaptive aviation maintenance system enhances the performance of carrier-based aircraft as radiation energy increases; however, this comes at the expense of a reduced structure and armor effect of the carrier-based aircraft.

name: oath of victory
desc: The adaptive power enhancement system enhances the ship's maneuverability and accelerates time flow as the radiation energy increases. However, the EMP damage received and the damage taken by the ship are increased by 25%.

name: final destruction
desc: The adaptive weapon enhancement system enhances the ratio of weapon damage to the hard radiation caused by the beam as the radiation energy increases.

name: break-up design
desc: The design of a dedicated large-scale engagement-breaking battleship will enhance the performance of the battleship as its structural value decreases.

name: Frontline Aircraft Carrier Scheduling
desc: The frontline heavy-duty aircraft carrier dispatching system enhances ship performance as the throughput of carrier-based aircraft increases.

desc: Control wing module behavior.
